LanguageData.Make_Flour.label: mill wheat into flour
LanguageData.Make_Flour.description: Process wheat ears into flour at the agronomy bench.
LanguageData.Make_Flour_Bulk.label: mill wheat into flour (bulk)
LanguageData.Make_Yeast.label: culture yeast
LanguageData.Make_Yeast_Bulk.label: culture yeast (bulk)
LanguageData.Make_Yeast_Bulk.description: Prepare a larger batch of yeast for sustained baking.
LanguageData.Make_UnfermentedDough.label: mix unfermented dough
LanguageData.Make_UnfermentedDough.description: Mix flour into basic dough for hard bread.
LanguageData.Make_FermentedDough.label: mix fermented dough
LanguageData.Make_FermentedDough.description: Add yeast while mixing dough to prepare high-quality bread dough.
LanguageData.Make_Puls.label: cook wheat porridge
LanguageData.Make_Puls.description: Boil wheat into a basic porridge. It is cheap but lowers mood.
LanguageData.Make_MilitarisBread.label: bake military bread
LanguageData.Make_MilitarisBread.description: Bake durable field bread from unfermented dough.
LanguageData.Make_LeavenedBread.label: bake white bread
LanguageData.Make_LeavenedBread.description: Bake soft white bread from fermented dough in a bread oven.
